name: Northbound Studio
based_on: Boutique brand-and-web studios in the Pentagram / Locomotive / Studio Lovelock mold — strategy-led, work-first portfolio sites with category-filtered case studies.
summary: A portfolio site for a small brand-and-web design studio, led by a confident statement hero and a filterable selected-work grid, with case-study highlights, a services list, an about section, client logos, and a contact form.
sections: Bold full-bleed statement hero ('We build brands people remember')
Selected work: project grid with category filter chips (Branding / Web / Motion) toggled in JS
Featured case-study highlight with before/after process imagery
Services list (brand identity, web design, art direction, motion)
Footer with email, socials, and location
setup_questions: What's the studio name and your one-line positioning?
What disciplines do you offer (branding, web, motion, packaging)?
Name 3-4 projects and their clients to feature as work.
What's the contact email and where are you based?
